root.sql: select sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.change_doc_no , sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no ) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no ) as group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no ) as group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate ( sysdate , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as sys_date , (select max(pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate ( book_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' )) from sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain where change_doc_no = sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.change_doc_no ) as book_date from sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.change_doc_no in ( select max(gain.change_doc_no) from sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain gain where gain.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no ) --and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain_head.membership_no = '041507' /*WHERE*/

r_tge_member_gain_nest.sql: select sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.change_doc_no , sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.rec_no , trim((select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.prename_code))||trim(sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_name)|| ' ' ||trim(sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_surname)as gain_name , FPA_GET_GAIN_ADDRESS (sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.rec_no)as gain_address from sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no = '041507' and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.change_doc_no = {0}
